recalls.Description: A recall has been issued for the Aiper Seagull Pro cordless robotic pool vacuum cleaner, model number ZT6001. This vacuum weighs around 24 pounds and measures approximately 19.5 x 18.5 x 15 inches. The brand name 'Aiper' is displayed prominently on the front of the dark gray unit, with the model name and serial number starting with 'S/N 61' located on a label underneath the device.
recalls.Title: Recall of Aiper Seagull Pro Cordless Robotic Pool Vacuum Cleaners Due to Fire and Burn Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers are urged to stop using the recalled vacuum immediately and contact Aiper at 888-968-0666, available from 9 a.m. to 9 p.m. ET, Monday to Friday. Additional information can be found by emailing recall@aiper.com or visiting https://aiper.com/seagullpro-recall/.

Products.Name: Aiper Seagull Pro Cordless Robotic Pool Vacuum Cleaner
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 32,660 (In addition, about 2,530 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled Aiper Seagull Pro Cordless Robotic Pool Cleaner
Label with model name and serial number located on the bottom of the recalled pool vacuum

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 19 reports of the recalled pool vacuums melting, smoking or catching on fire while charging causing five incidents of property damage. No injuries have been reported.

Manufacturers.Name: Dongguan Yuanhong Intelligent Technology Co. Ltd., of China

Retailers.Name: Available at Best Buy, Home Depot, Lowe's, Walmart, and online at www.aiper.com, Amazon.com, Bestbuy.com, HomeDepot.com, Lowes.com, and Walmart.com from March 2023 through May 2024, priced between $700 and $900.

Distributors.Name: Shenzhen Aiper Intelligent Co. Ltd., of China

Hazards.Name: Overheating current adapter leading to burn and fire hazards

Remedies.Name: Consumers will receive a free replacement Aiper Scuba S1 robotic pool cleaner and a prepaid return label for the recalled unit. Replacement units will be shipped within 15 days of returning the Seagull Pro.

recalls.metaDescription: Aiper recalls Seagull Pro robotic pool cleaners due to fire hazards. Contact Aiper for a free replacement and more information.

recalls.Description: Southern Telecom has announced a recall of the Brookstone TurboVac Handheld Rechargeable Vacuums, identified by Model No. BSBVAC301, which can be found on the back of the device. The vacuum features the "Brookstone" logo on the front and is designed in black, measuring 2.89 x 12 inches. It includes a wall-mounting plate for convenient storage.
recalls.Title: Southern Telecom Issues Recall for Brookstone TurboVac Handheld Rechargeable Vacuums Due to Fire Risk; Available Exclusively at Belk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Southern Telecom at 866-450-4493 from 9 a.m. to 5:30 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or email support@customersupport123.com. More information is available online at www.southerntelecom.com under the "Safety Recalls" section.

Images.Caption: Recalled Brookstone TurboVac Handheld Rechargeable Vacuum (Model No. BSBVAC301)

Injuries.Name: The firm has received two reports of serious fires caused by the vacuums, resulting in property damage.

Retailers.Name: Available at Belk stores nationwide and online at www.belk.com from September 2022 to February 2024, priced around $90.

Importers.Name: Southern Telecom Inc., of New York

Hazards.Name: Potential fire hazard due to short circuiting during or after battery charging.

Remedies.Name: Consumers are urged to stop using the recalled vacuums and contact Southern Telecom for a full refund.

recalls.metaDescription: Southern Telecom recalls Brookstone TurboVac Handheld Rechargeable Vacuums due to fire hazards. Contact for refunds and safety info.

recalls.Description: BISSELL is recalling several models of its Multi Reach Hand and Floor Vacuum Cleaners due to a potential fire hazard. The affected models include 1985, 19851 (also known as Multi Auto), 19859, 1985T, 2151, 21512, 21513, 21517, 21518, 21519, 2151A, 2151T, 2151W, and 2151V. Each model features 'Multi Reach' printed on the hand vacuum section, and the model numbers can be found on the rating label located behind the dirt tank. Consumers should be aware that recalled lithium-ion batteries must be disposed of properly, following local regulations and guidelines from municipal recycling centers, rather than being discarded in regular trash or battery recycling bins.
recalls.Title: BISSELL Recalls Multi Reach Hand and Floor Vacuum Cleaners Due to Fire Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach BISSELL at 855-417-7001 from 9 a.m. to 9 p.m. ET Monday through Friday, and 9 a.m. to 8 p.m. ET on Saturday. Alternatively, they can email RecallNA@bissell.com or visit www.BISSELL.com/recall for more details.

Products.Name: BISSELL Multi Reach Hand and Floor Vacuum Cleaners
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 142,000 (In addition, about 14,600 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled BISSELL Multi Reach Hand and Floor Vacuum Cleaner with floor attachment
Recalled BISSELL Multi Reach Hand and Floor Vacuum Cleaner with handheld attachment
Product rating label located behind the dirt tank
A close up of the product rating label behind the dirt tank. The arrow is pointing to the model number

Injuries.Name: BISSELL has received 17 reports of the recalled vacuum cleaners smoking and emitting a burning odor. Six of the reports included the battery pack catching fire, three of which resulted in minor property damage and two resulting in minor burn injuries.

Retailers.Name: Available at Lowe's, Macy's, Kohl's, Target, Walmart, Best Buy, and various other retailers, as well as online at www.bissell.com, www.amazon.com, www.hsn.com, and more from August 2016 through December 2022, priced between $110 and $270.

Importers.Name: BISSELL Homecare Inc., of Grand Rapids, Michigan

Hazards.Name: Overheating battery pack posing a fire risk

Remedies.Name: Stop using the vacuums, contact BISSELL for battery depletion instructions, and receive a free replacement vacuum.

recalls.metaDescription: BISSELL recalls Multi Reach Vacuum Cleaners due to fire hazards. Learn how to get a free replacement and dispose of batteries safely.

recalls.Description: The recall affects the Oreck Discover Upright Vacuum models UK30500 and UK30500PC. These vacuums may have serial numbers starting with AJ2226 through AJ2232. The model and serial numbers can be found on a silver data label located on the bottom of the vacuum, which features a silver and black design with 'Oreck' and 'Discover' branding on the front.
recalls.Title: Oreck Discover Upright Vacuums Recalled Due to Electrical Shock Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should cease using the affected vacuums and reach out to Oreck at 888-383-7000 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or visit www.oreck.com/pages/recall for further details.

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 41 reports of a prong detaching from its plug. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available through independent Oreck dealers nationwide and online at www.acmetools.com, www.amazon.com, www.homedepot.com, and www.oreck.com from September 2022 to September 2023 for approximately $600.

Importers.Name: Royal Appliance Mfg. Co., d/b/a TTI Floor Care North America, of Charlotte, North Carolina

Hazards.Name: Risk of electric shock due to detachable plug prong

Remedies.Name: Contact Oreck or a local dealer for free repair instructions

recalls.metaDescription: Oreck recalls Discover Upright Vacuums due to a potential electrical shock hazard. Learn how to get a free repair.
